title: Sticky Fireworks
description: Rockets that stick to nearby mobs and launch them into the sky!
body:
## 🌐 ITITAN Hosting
[![ITITAN Hosting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/3geETR/images/refs/heads/main/Other/ititan.png)](https://ititanhosting.com/game/minecraft)


# **Sticky Fireworks**

Sticky Fireworks is a chaotic twist on vanilla rockets. When launched, they grab nearby mobs and blast off into the sky, dragging everything in their path with them. Explosive fun with a sticky surprise!

## Craft
You can craft with a rocket of your choice and a slime ball.
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/814aa506ff7ceb86655a177a54c779cb7e363a61_0.webp)


## Entities
_Known bug: I don't know why, but mojang decided that in the new versions, if the entity gets on the rocket immediately, the rocket will explode. So you need to fire the rocket from a little bit below. We will try to fix this bug in the future_


![creeper blow up with rocket](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExMzg4NW13bjkycWR0MDFpeDFycWY4bndtbWJkMDhxd2k5eWFkcnhvMSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/UZ5uiJuVOsnCOBZ7jW/giphy.gif)


## Dispensers
_Sticky fireworks also work with dispensers! Unfortunately, the same bug with entities applies here. The solution is shown in the image._

![Dispenser blow up sheep](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcTZ1ZDdvbGV1eHIyZ3luZ2tkM2VlczNlNW8xbXdqdzdnNXZ2aDRtbiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/tA2skzIulG7rgYcNdq/giphy.gif)


## Projectiles
_If you master sticky fireworks, you can block projectiles or find a new way to set traps!_

![New pvp methods..](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExYXB2eTNwYTJuMHhtaDA5azZkbHdtb2ZmZzh1cnFxY2hqN3RjYjVybyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/IMnvJgXEjOflfCZjhz/giphy.gif)


## Items
_You can also move items with sticky fireworks. Maybe you will find a new method of item transportation :D_

![Item transportation](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExaDl3OHF4cHEyZjk3b3BqNjAxbDRzaXd5OTJ1aWZ4NTI3aXliODBkNCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/z1gvuJdBVR4eDNxqRC/giphy.gif)


### You can change the entities that sticky fireworks will not affect from tags>entity_type>entity_exclude_list in the datapack.

**Your feedback is important to us. You can write on Discord. Discord name: tpcoffline**

---
